check_groups.title: Topology and layer-boundary preservation
review_prompts: Does the accepted delta keep engine, shared-environment, app, and repo-package boundaries intact?
Does the accepted delta preserve the fixed release order and the chat-as-projection posture?
escalation_on: repo layout presented as runtime ownership

check_groups.title: Run, context, and provenance continuity
review_prompts: Does the accepted delta keep Run, Evidence Pack, Context Pack, and provenance continuity as explicit shared objects?
Does the accepted delta avoid transcript-local or view-local substitutes for frozen context, replay basis, or lineage?

check_groups.title: Governance, proof, and writeback-lane discipline
review_prompts: Does the accepted delta preserve lane-separated artifact, memory, canon, workflow, and export/writeback behavior?
Does the accepted delta keep proof, review, approval, and apply behavior on typed boundaries instead of collapsing them into narrative surfaces?

check_groups.title: Projection grammar and repo-boundary discipline
review_prompts: Does the accepted delta keep views as projections over shared objects rather than introducing app-private backends?
Does the accepted delta preserve the accepted workspace-family, naming, and cross-root boundary rules?

check_groups.title: Forbidden-shortcut and Platform Gate regression review
review_prompts: Does the accepted delta avoid master-chat truth, silent proposal application, second-stack drift, hidden memory sludge, and other forbidden shortcuts?
Does the accepted delta preserve Platform Gate as a blocking substrate proof rather than downgrading it into advisory release commentary?

result_status_catalog.meaning: The checklist group was reviewed and no architecture drift was found.
The checklist group is structurally ready but still requires explicit human architecture review.
The checklist group found a downstream artifact or assumption that should enter stale review.
The checklist group is missing accepted baseline artifacts or other required review inputs.
